candidate_formula: S_gauge proportional to [3 Vol(S^3)]^-1 sum_a int Tr(F_a^2) dmu_B
claim_boundary: Even a geometric frame average would not normalize gauge couplings unless the gauge action applies it to trace densities.
evidence_against: no normalized action attaches the boundary/frame average to Tr(F_a^2)
evidence_for: a conditional gauge action skeleton and trace normalization exist
